title: B2: Pending auto-archive (>30d via doctor --apply-lint)
description: Doctor --apply-lint adds pending auto-archive. Pending entries (in either root) with mtime > 30 days → git mv to `.fabric/.archive/pending/<type>/` (team) or `~/.fabric/.archive/pending/<type>/` (personal). Emit new event `pending_auto_archived` with `pending_path`, `archived_to`, `reason`. Lint check counted as #21 (existing) but with auto-archive action gated to `--apply-lint`. Per scope.md §2.B2.

files.change: Add mtime>30d filter; on --apply-lint, git mv pending to .archive/pending/<type>/; emit pending_auto_archived event
Add pending_auto_archived event type with fields pending_path, archived_to, reason

implementation: Add pending_auto_archived event to event-ledger.ts discriminated union (additive — no breaking change)
In doctor.ts, locate lint #21 stale-pending check; extend with mtime filter (Date.now() - stat.mtimeMs > 30*86400_000)
On --apply-lint path: compute archive dest = (layer === 'personal' ? '~/.fabric' : '.fabric') + '/.archive/pending/<type>/'; mkdir -p; git mv (or fs.rename fallback)
Emit pending_auto_archived event with pending_path, archived_to, reason='mtime>30d'
Add unit tests: dry-run reports without moving; --apply-lint moves and emits event
Verify both pending roots covered (team and personal)

reference.examples: Mirror existing apply-lint action patterns; reuse git mv helper if present

criteria: doctor --apply-lint pending >30d auto-archives to .archive/pending/ (or ~/.fabric/.archive/pending/) and emits pending_auto_archived event
Event payload includes pending_path, archived_to, reason fields
Dry-run (no --apply-lint) reports but does not move

rationale.chosen_approach: Extend existing lint #21 with mtime gate + apply-lint action; reuse doctor.ts additive pattern
decision_factors: Doctor is the canonical lifecycle engine
rationale.tradeoffs: 30d threshold is arbitrary; configurable via fabric-config.json later if needed

manual_checks: Touch a pending file mtime to 31d ago; run fabric doctor --apply-lint; observe move + event
success_metrics: Move executed; event written to events.jsonl

risks.description: git mv fails if .fabric/.archive/ not initialized
risks.mitigation: mkdir -p before mv; fallback to fs.rename if git mv unavailable
risks.fallback: Skip with warning, retry next run
